description:
![Cover](https://i.ibb.co/FKkc9nY/museum-base.png)

Me being the first user to share this game without having Shino's scene messed up, after the game being released almost a *YEAR AGO* goes to show how most sites just don't give a single fuck about curating the content they REupload and profit from it. Also, if girlcelly and mikocon don't buy a game (or get a game shared to them through their own places) does that mean that NOBODY is going to get it? Oh well, leechers gotta be leechers smh.

Regarding the game, here are some things worthwile to comment on:

1. The crack provided will let you see the museum content that you have unlocked and won't wipe the progress everytime you close the game
2. For some reason, the game does not include the **se.bsa** file, since they decided ONLY for this game to pack them inside the executable's file. If you put that file coming from the same game but in the original release inside the game's root folder, you will be able to replace the sound effects that you don't like by editing said file
3. Keeping the game uninstalled is recommended, this way you can keep the save file inside the game's folder instead of cluttering the AppData folder even more (or just edit the registry key that saves that path, that works too)

Contact me: https://discord.gg/fjZKJJUWw4
